name: ws-bridge-jobs-logs
title: Phase D: WebSocket bridge (jobs/logs)
description: Add minimal WebSocket bridge to stream job state and logs/events to the Vue workspace; keep HTTP endpoints + polling as fallback.
creator: zquant
notes: WebSocket bridge implementation completed. All 3 rounds of review findings fixed: backend subscribe protocol, frontend connection lifecycle (manualClose flag), and component cleanup hooks (onUnmounted moved to setup top-level). CORS configuration added. All acceptance criteria met.
